translation.literal_translation: If one says there is contradiction in ritual action, no: because multiple manifestation is observed. (27)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.3.27: karma-level contradiction fails due to aneka-pratipatti (simultaneous multi-form manifestation) evidenced in scripture.
translation.interpretive_note: Compact sutra response to the karma-virodha objection.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Curated in contiguous S03 pass with stable cadence and inferential-tag schema.
A later philological pass should revisit technical choices around sphota/varna vocabulary in records 1.3.068 and 1.3.069.
